value: Thanks so much for taking the time to share this feedback—it really means a lot to us! We're thrilled that Simon was able to help you get sorted and that you've decided to upgrade. It's great to hear that our team went the extra mile, and we appreciate you letting us know. We'll definitely pass along your kind words to both of them. Thanks for being such a great customer, and we're excited to have you on board with your upgrade!
